articles.title: Bitcoin More Likely to Move to $60,000 Than Drop Further, Says Bloomberg Analyst
articles.description: Bloomberg commodity strategist Mike McGlone has weighed in on Bitcoin’s outlook for the near future and revealed he believes the cryptocurrency is more likely to move upward toward the $60,000 than to drop back down to $20,000. According to a section shared by Bloomberg’s exchange-traded fund (ETF) senior analyst Eric Balchunas, McGlone wrote in a […]

articles.title: Dogecoin Fan Offers 10 Percent Discount on His House if Buyer Pays Him in DOGE
articles.description: A Utah man has decided to do his part in pushing Dogecoin adoption by offering a generous discount on his house

articles.title: Binance Reduces Daily Withdrawals for Unverified Accounts to 0.06 BTC
articles.description: Binance has reduced daily withdrawal limits for unverified accounts from 2 BTC to 0.06 BTC Binance has also reduced leverage on new futures accounts to 20x There is also a new tax reporting tool on Binance for users who are obligated to report their capital gains The exchange has implemented the new changes as it works towards complying with regulators globally The popular crypto exchange of...

articles.title: Newly found Monero bug may impact transaction privacy, developers warn
articles.description: Monero developers are working on a software fix for a newly identified bug that may expose the occurrence of an output transaction made right away after receiving funds.

articles.title: Monero Bug Breaks Transaction Privacy
articles.description: A recently discovered bug in the Monero cryptocurrency has compromised transaction privacy, raising concerns about the security of user data. This vulnerability could potentially allow unauthorized parties to access sensitive transaction information, prompting urgent calls for users to take precautions. Developers are working to fix the issue and restore Monero's privacy features.

articles.title: Crypto Markets Turn Red After Amazon Denied Reports of Accepting BTC (Market Watch)
articles.description: The entire market is painted red today. This comes after Amazon denied the rumors of planning to accept BTC this year.

articles.title: Tether rejects claims of renewed scrutiny over suspected bank fraud
articles.description: World’s largest stablecoin dismisses report suggesting possibility of U.S. investigation, despite claims of recent Justice Department interest and track record of legal woes.
